src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate the Generated annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by newer Spring Boot versions.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.annotation does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3.x / JDK 17+ context).

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation with jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: javax.annotation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.annotation does not exist'.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Fix invalid escape sequence in string literal to comply with stricter Java compiler rules.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Compilation error: invalid escape sequence '\'' in string literal (Java 17 compiler is stricter about unrecognized escape sequences than older versions).

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace the Hibernate5 Jackson module with its Jakarta EE namespace equivalent to support the migration from javax to jakarta packages.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The original Hibernate5Module relies on javax.persistence classes which are removed or incompatible in Jakarta EE environments; using the wrong module causes runtime ClassNotFound or linkage errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated setLabels method with setLabelFilter to align with updated Spring Boot LiquibaseProperties API.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The method setLabels(String) was removed or deprecated in favor of setLabelFilter(String) in newer Spring Boot versions; calling the old method causes a compile error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with SecurityFilterChain bean to comply with Spring Security 6 API changes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7 and removed in Spring Security 6; extending it causes compilation errors or runtime failures in Spring Boot 3.x.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to align with Spring Security 6 method security configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity is deprecated and removed in Spring Security 6; using it prevents compilation or runtime initialization.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate HttpSecurity configuration from fluent builder methods to lambda DSL required by Spring Security 6.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The old fluent API (e.g., .authorizeRequests(), .headers()) is removed in Spring Security 6; code must use lambda DSL (e.g., .authorizeHttpRequests(authz -> ...)) to compile.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated antMatchers with requestMatchers in authorization rules.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: antMatchers is deprecated and removed in Spring Security 6; requestMatchers is the required replacement for defining request matchers.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated featurePolicy with permissionsPolicy in header configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: featurePolicy is removed in Spring Security 6; permissionsPolicy is the new standard for browser feature policies.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove dependency on removed SecurityProblemSupport class for exception handling.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: SecurityProblemSupport from problem-spring-web is no longer used or compatible; exception handling must be configured via standard Spring Security entry points.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace custom Ajax authentication handlers with standard HttpStatus responses.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Custom Ajax handlers (AjaxAuthenticationSuccessHandler) are removed; standard HTTP status codes are now used for API authentication responses.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace custom Ajax logout handler with standard HttpStatusReturningLogoutSuccessHandler.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Custom AjaxLogoutSuccessHandler is removed; standard handler is required for logout success responses.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate WebSecurity ignoring configuration to SecurityFilterChain or remove if handled by filters.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter.configure(WebSecurity) is removed; static resource ignoring must be handled via SecurityFilterChain or filters.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add CsrfTokenRequestAttributeHandler to fix CSRF token retrieval in Spring Security 6.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Spring Security 6 changes how CSRF tokens are retrieved; explicit handler is often needed to maintain compatibility with frontend expectations.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace CorsFilter injection with SpaWebFilter and CookieCsrfFilter additions.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: CorsFilter handling is changed; new filters are added to handle SPA-specific security requirements in the new architecture.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update Content-Security-Policy configuration to use lambda DSL and property-based directives.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Old CSP configuration method is removed; new lambda DSL is required for setting policy directives.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update frameOptions to use lambda DSL and sameOrigin policy.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Old frameOptions configuration is removed; new lambda DSL is required.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove unused imports and dependencies related to old Spring Security API.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Old imports (e.g., WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter, AjaxAuthenticationSuccessHandler) are no longer valid or needed.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add new imports required for Spring Security 6 configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: New classes (e.g., SecurityFilterChain, CsrfTokenRequestAttributeHandler) are required for the new configuration style.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Simplify constructor by removing unused dependencies.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Constructor no longer needs CorsFilter and SecurityProblemSupport as they are removed from the configuration.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove bean definitions for removed custom handlers.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Beans for AjaxAuthenticationSuccessHandler, AjaxAuthenticationFailureHandler, and AjaxLogoutSuccessHandler are no longer needed.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: javax.servlet package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.
